artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a Rutgers IT AI guidance page with direct guidance on approved tools, coursework permission, instructor communication, academic integrity, and confidential data. Claims are limited to that official source; broader teaching resources and course-level syllabi were not used as university-wide policy evidence.

artifacts.title: Rutgers University-New Brunswick AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Rutgers University-New Brunswick has an official Rutgers IT AI guidance page covering approved AI tools, coursework expectations, faculty communication, academic integrity context, and confidential-data cautions. This staged bundle uses that page for four narrow agent-reviewed claim candidates and rejects broader teaching/course-level sources as insufficient for university-wide policy claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Course-level syllabi and general pedagogical resources were not generalized into university-wide policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
